contract: outside 228 expected cell IDs are excluded
discharge row is preferred for capacity/timestamp
discharge energy is absolute value; charge energy from charge row
10 ms and 1 s resistance are converted from mOhm to Ohm
pulse rows align to nearest EOC check-up timestamp
real/imag/absolute impedance are converted from mOhm to Ohm
valid modeling mask applies frequency and NaN exclusions
EIS rows align to nearest EOC check-up timestamp
LOG_AGE is parsed in CSV batches and written incrementally
nan strings become null diagnostics in nullable columns
